problem id: 4e4fb429
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHL(2)

examples:
  10010000 -> 01001001
  00010111 -> 01111101
  11101001 -> 10111110
  00101011 -> 10111110
  01000011 -> 00111100
  10110101 -> 11011111
  01100111 -> 11111110
  11001111 -> 11111100

query: 01100011
predicted answer: 10111110
